ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "years_active" TEXT /* Years the player was active in the league */,
  "total_goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Current active status of the player (e.g., Active, Retired) */,
  "yr_start" INTEGER /* Year when the player started their career */,
  "yr_end" INTEGER /* Year when the player ended their career */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position (e.g., Forward, Defenseman, Goaltender) */,
  "shoots" TEXT /* Player's shooting hand */,
  "catches" TEXT /* Player's catching hand */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Player's birth date */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Player's birth place */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the link */,
  "raw_link" TEXT /* Raw link path for the player's profile */,
  "url_number" INTEGER /* URL number identifier */,
  "link" TEXT /* Full URL to access the player's profile */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., Official, Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_links_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player for whom statistics are recorded */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes accumulated by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Player's plus/minus rating */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals scored by the player */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of short handed goals scored by the player */,
  "game_tying_goals" INTEGER /* Number of game tying goals scored by the player */,
  "empty_net_goals" INTEGER /* Number of empty net goals scored by the player */,
  "overtime_goals" INTEGER /* Number of overtime goals scored by the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season for which the statistics are recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award received */,
  "year_awarded" INTEGER /* Year when the award was presented */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., Individual, Team) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the team coached */,
  "years_active" TEXT /* Years the coach was active */,
  "coach_type" TEXT /* Type of coach (e.g., Head, Assistant) */,
  "games_coached" INTEGER /* Total games coached by the coach */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the coach */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the coach */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Total ties by the coach */,
  "points_percentage" TEXT /* Coach's points percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_coaches" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season for which the player was coached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "coach_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "team_league" TEXT /* League in which the team plays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
